evidenceBoundary: Planning handoff, independent caller-provided RED, current exact green replays, complete pre-repair Bond replay, and current-session root-cause diagnostics only. Planned delivery rows carry no pass claim until implementation and independent test execute them.
protectedTestTitle: BS-011 Simple and Power share one model digest
noSecretNetworkAssumptions: Browser tests serve real production bytes over the existing ephemeral loopback HTTP server.
Only the true external Treasury boundary may use deterministic checked-in CSV fixtures.
No test reads credentials or contacts production monitoring, backup, deployment, release-train, or knb surfaces.
No test mutates product files, shared baseline data, Feature 003/006 artifacts, BUG-002, Market Brief, registries, or package graph.
